token_id.description: Stable token identifier within the processed input.

normalized_surface.description: Optional normalized token form after Unicode and format normalization.

tokenizer_local_id.description: Tokenizer- or model-local token identifier, if available.

sentence_id.description: Identifier of the sentence or utterance containing this token.

document_id.description: Identifier of the source document or input unit.

boundaries: The schema does not mandate a concrete tokenizer.
The schema does not expose model weights.
The schema does not approve memory storage.
The schema does not define runtime execution.
